title: Report on the subsidy to Ebbsfleet Garden City Trust by Ebbsfleet Development Corporation
body: "The SAU has published its report providing advice to EDC concerning the proposed Subsidy to the Trust.  The report includes the SAU’s evaluation of EDC’s assessment of compliance of its proposed scheme with the requirements set out in the Subsidy Control Act 2022.  For more information visit the Referral of the proposed subsidy to Ebbsfleet Garden City Trust by Ebbsfleet Development Corporation - GOV.UK. "
